name: Red Pepper and Ginger Marmalade
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Red bell peppers (12 medium to large peppers)
recipeInstructions:
1. Core and seed the peppers, then cut them into 1/4-inch wide lengthwise strips (12 cups total).
2. Heat the butter and olive oil in a heavy flameproof casserole.
- Add garlic and ginger; cook over low heat for 5 minutes.
3. Mix in orange zest, juice, sugar, and pepper. Stir gently and cover.
4. Cook over medium-low heat, stirring occasionally, until peppers are wilted and skins are soft (25 minutes).
5. Remove the cover and continue cooking over low heat, stirring frequently, until most liquid has evaporated (2 hours).
6. Serve hot or at room temperature. Keeps covered tightly in refrigerator for up to 4 days.
